parents.subject: LU-19143 tcu: test Trash Can with various UID/GID/PROJID setting

commit.subject: LU-19143 tcu: unrm files should restore original UID/GID/ProjID
commit.message:
LU-19143 tcu: unrm files should restore original UID/GID/ProjID

Unrm files from Trash Can should also restore the original UID,
GID and ProjID.
Also it should delete the "trusted.unrm" XATTR which was used to
store the original IDs.

Add a test case sanityn/test_117x.

Change-Id: Ifc9810d87e5c9ed426699fbde66761d7cbb5109e
Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
